utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items required in the final format: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (present); travel_dates (present); transportation (has flights with cost and local transport with cost, so covered); accommodation (hotel name and cost, covered); activities (listed, but no costs provided, so not fully specified per format); additional_services (listed but no cost, so not fully specified per format); total_budget (single total amount provided, but not a complete cost breakdown itemized per category, so not fully specified). Therefore, fully specified items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation = 4. Total items required = 7.
